channel.title: Colourity — Personal Colour Analysis & Outfit Matching
channel.description: Official blog feed for Colourity. Personal colour analysis, skin tone matching, and Indian outfit guides for sarees, kurtas, anarkalis, and men's wear.

item.title: What's My Colour Season? A Simple Undertone Test (No App Needed)
item.description:
What's My Colour Season? A Simple Undertone Test (No App Needed) 💡
Find your colour season in 3 quick questions — undertone, depth, and clarity. No professional draping required.
Key Style Insights: ✨ What a "Colour Season" Actually Means ✨ Question 1: What's Your Undertone? ✨ Question 2: What's Your Depth?
📲 Tap the link in our bio to read the full guide & download Colourity AI for personalized wardrobe color matching!
#Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #IndianSkinTone #WardrobeStyling #DesiFashion #FashionIndia #IndianOutfits #ColourityAI

item.title: Warm vs Cool vs Neutral Undertone: How to Tell the Difference
item.description:
Warm vs Cool vs Neutral Undertone: How to Tell the Difference 💡
A clear side-by-side comparison of warm, cool, and neutral undertones — tests, best colours, and best metals for each.
Key Style Insights: ✨ The Comparison at a Glance ✨ The Two Fastest Tests ✨ What If the Two Tests Disagree?
📲 Tap the link in our bio to read the full guide & download Colourity AI for personalized wardrobe color matching!
#Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #IndianSkinTone #WardrobeStyling #DesiFashion #FashionIndia #IndianOutfits #ColourityAI

item.title: The Complete Guide to Indian Skin Tones and the Colours That Suit Them
item.description:
The Complete Guide to Indian Skin Tones and the Colours That Suit Them 💡
A complete, undertone-aware guide to Indian skin tones — fair, wheatish, dusky, and deep — and the colours that genuinely suit each.
Key Style Insights: ✨ Two Things That Are Often Confused ✨ Fair Skin Tones ✨ Wheatish / Medium Skin Tones
📲 Tap the link in our bio to read the full guide & download Colourity AI for personalized wardrobe color matching!
#Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #IndianSkinTone #WardrobeStyling #DesiFashion #FashionIndia #IndianOutfits #ColourityAI

item.title: Office Wear Colours That Actually Suit You (Not Just Boring Black and Navy)

item.title: Does Pantone's 2026 Colour of the Year (Cloud Dancer) Suit Your Skin Tone?

item.title: Is Colour Analysis Actually Legit, or Just a TikTok Trend?

item.title: Why Do Some Colours Make You Look Tired? The Science of Colour and Skin
